title: Munch & Crunch Bone Chews for Dogs Multipack - 8 Tripe Filled Rawhide Dog Bones - Tasty Treat Chewy Snacks 4 Packs
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: BIG MULTIPACK - Kerhoot Tasty Tripe Filled Bones Taste Great And Dogs Love Them - Natural Ingredients
SNACKS FOR DOGS - Promotes Healthy Teeth And Gums - Highly Palatable - Helps Fight Plaque & Tartar
HEALTHY DOG TREATS- Delicious Munch & Crunch Rawhide and Tripe Chews - Show Your Pets How Much You Love Them
EIGHT BONES - Rawhide Bones Packed With Tasty Tripe 10cm long - Effective Oral Care For Small Medium And Large Dogs
description: Product Description BEST SELLER ITEM - You will receive EIGHT Tripe Filled Bones - Four packs of two, sealed for freshness. DOGS GO MAD FOR THESE - Munch & Crunch Rawhide Tripe Filled Bones are 10cm long. The inner filling is Delicious and designed to be chewed for long enough to assist in cleaning your dogs teeth. Dog's use their mouth for everything so having healthy teeth and gums is absolutely essential for them. These bones last long enough to satisfy your dog. Keep your pet happy and healthy - always supervise your dog while chewing treats and ensure they have access to plenty fresh water. Indications Adult, All Breed Sizes, Raw Diet Ingredients Tripe & Natural Raw Hide Directions Pressed Rawhide Tripe Filled Bones For DogsLong lasting tripe chewing bones for dogs. Feed as a treat or reward for good behaviour.Dogs Dental CareChewing these bones can help promote healthy teeth and gums for your dog.Complimentary Pet Food For DogsIt is recommended that all pets are supervised when feeding. Always offer fresh water with the food.Multipack 8 BonesThis pack contains a total of 8 rawhide tripe bones. Length 10cm Safety Warning Dogs should be supervised when eating treats which may break into smaller pieces See more
